---
title: "Home"
---

::: {.column-margin}
![](assets/hoff-art.png.png){fig-alt="Abstract geometric artwork" width="100%"}
:::

# Welcome

I’m building a math and personal website with Obsidian, Quarto, and GitHub Pages.

## Sections

- [About](about.qmd)
- [Notes](notes/index.qmd)
- [Posts](posts/index.qmd)
